rules.name: Human review gate
rules.requiredAction: Resolve every review and revalidation action.

rules.name: Production eligibility conditions
rules.requiredAction: Obtain separately authorized Production Specification handoff outside this build.

rules.name: Permission separation
rules.requirement: Production Eligible never grants Asset Generation Permission.

rules.name: No execution interface
rules.requirement: This ruleset cannot invoke image, garment, procurement or production systems.

rules.name: Existing production rules only
rules.requirement: Any production reference resolves to Existing Production Rules; no new Production Specification field is created here.
